title: Banting chocolate brownies – it doesn't feel like you're missing out.
excerpt: Okay, I know everyone is pretty fed up with banting, but the non-banters can eat this too. It's delicious and quick to make. I make a batch and then I freeze it. Whenever the craving gets the better of me, I take out a block and pop it in the microwave for 10 seconds …

seo.title: Banting chocolate brownies - it doesn't feel like you're missing out. - Marinda Kook

html:
Okay, I know everyone is pretty fed up with banting, but the non-banters can eat this too. It's delicious and quick to make. I make a batch and then I freeze it. Whenever the craving gets the better of me, I take out a block and pop it in the microwave for 10 seconds. It's delicious as a dessert with a nice thick cream. Give it a go!!!!!!!!!

 

YOU'LL NEED:

  • 250 ml melted butter
  • 250 ml almond flour
  • 250 ml cocoa
  • 250 ml Xylitol
  • 6 eggs
  • 5 ml vanilla
  • 125 ml cream
  • finely chopped nuts is your choice – I put nuts in and it tastes even better

NOW:

Whisk the eggs

Whisk in the rest of the ingredients. It must be a thick, wet batter.

 

Pour into a greased dish and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 30 minutes. Test and let it bake a little longer if it isn't done yet.

 

Let it cool. Cut into blocks and enjoy the decadent deliciousness.
